description: Ray marched terrain using a height field driven by noise_fields FBM, with fog and sky gradient.

operations.notes: Displace ground plane with FBM for terrain

post_process.sky: gradient based on ray direction Y

example_prompts: create ray marched terrain using FBM noise displacement on a ground plane
build procedural mountain landscape with fog and sky gradient
compose atmospheric terrain scene using noise_fields FBM for height

camera.notes: Camera above terrain looking toward horizon

screenshot_metadata.notes: terrainSDF(p) = p.y - fbm(p.xz * 0.1) * 3.0. Use soft shadows. Exponential fog.
